name: East of main street
description:
You are on the small cobblestoned main street of Bree.  To the north is the
Hall of Guilds, an unimposing administrative building.  To the northwest is the
northern gate of Bree.  The Great East Road turns south to go around Bree Hill
and continues east into the Greenway.  You can see the entrance to the
courthouse to the southwest, and the Prancing Pony to the east.
